---
name: ⚡ Performance Issue
about: Report performance problems or slow loading times
title: '[PERFORMANCE] '
labels: ['performance', 'needs-investigation']
assignees: ''
---

## ⚡ Performance Issue Summary
**Brief description of the performance problem:**

## 🐌 Performance Problem
**What specific performance issue are you experiencing?**

**Issue Type:**
- [ ] 🐌 Slow page loading
- [ ] 🔄 Slow API responses
- [ ] 🎵 Audio/media loading delays
- [ ] 📱 App startup time
- [ ] 🖱️ UI responsiveness/lag
- [ ] 💾 High memory usage
- [ ] 🔋 Battery drain (mobile)
- [ ] 🌐 Network timeouts
- [ ] 📊 Database query performance
- [ ] 🎨 Rendering/animation issues

**Affected Features:**
- [ ] 🎓 Lesson loading/playback
- [ ] 🗣️ Pronunciation practice
- [ ] 👥 Community features
- [ ] 📊 Progress tracking
- [ ] 🔍 Search functionality
- [ ] 📱 Mobile app navigation
- [ ] 🎵 Audio playback
- [ ] 📸 Image/media loading
- [ ] 💬 Real-time chat/messaging
- [ ] 📈 Analytics dashboard

## 📊 Performance Metrics
**Quantify the performance issue:**

**Timing:**
- Expected load time: [e.g. 2-3 seconds]
- Actual load time: [e.g. 15-20 seconds]
- Time to first interaction: [e.g. 10 seconds]
- Time to complete action: [e.g. 30 seconds to submit]

**Resource Usage:**
- Memory usage: [e.g. 500MB, constantly increasing]
- CPU usage: [e.g. 80-90% during audio playback]
- Network usage: [e.g. 50MB for a single lesson]
- Battery impact: [e.g. 20% drain in 30 minutes]

**Frequency:**
- [ ] Always occurs
- [ ] Occurs frequently (>50% of the time)
- [ ] Occurs sometimes (10-50% of the time)
- [ ] Occurs rarely (<10% of the time)
- [ ] Only occurs under specific conditions

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
**How can we reproduce this performance issue?**

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Wait for '....'
4. Observe slow performance

**Specific Conditions:**
- Time of day: [e.g. Peak hours, specific timezone]
- User state: [e.g. Logged in, specific lesson progress]
- Data state: [e.g. Large lesson history, many bookmarks]
- Network conditions: [e.g. WiFi, mobile data, slow connection]

## 📱 Environment Information
**Device & System:**
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 14, Samsung Galaxy S23, MacBook Pro M2]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 16.5, Android 13, macOS 13.4, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Safari 16.5, Chrome 115, Firefox 116]
- App Version: [e.g. v1.2.3, build 456]
- Available RAM: [e.g. 8GB, 4GB]
- Storage available: [e.g. 50GB free, 2GB free]

**Network:**
- Connection type: [e.g. WiFi, 4G, 5G, Ethernet]
- Speed: [e.g. 100Mbps down/20Mbps up, slow mobile data]
- Latency: [e.g. 20ms, 200ms]
- Location: [e.g. Urban area, Rural area, International]

**Application State:**
- User account type: [e.g. Free, Premium, Admin]
- Lesson progress: [e.g. Beginner level 5, Advanced level 20]
- Data size: [e.g. 100 completed lessons, 500 bookmarks]
- Cache state: [e.g. Fresh install, Long-term user, Recently cleared cache]

## 🎯 Expected Performance
**What performance did you expect?**

**Benchmarks:**
- Expected load time: [e.g. Under 3 seconds]
- Expected responsiveness: [e.g. Immediate UI feedback]
- Expected resource usage: [e.g. Under 200MB RAM]
- Comparison apps: [e.g. Similar to Duolingo, Faster than Babbel]

## 📈 Performance Impact
**How does this affect your learning experience?**

**User Experience:**
- [ ] 😤 Extremely frustrating, unusable
- [ ] 😕 Very annoying, considering switching apps
- [ ] 🙄 Somewhat annoying, but manageable
- [ ] 😐 Noticeable but doesn't prevent usage
- [ ] 🤷 Minor issue, barely noticeable

**Learning Impact:**
- [ ] Prevents completing lessons
- [ ] Disrupts learning flow/concentration
- [ ] Causes audio sync issues
- [ ] Makes pronunciation practice difficult
- [ ] Affects progress tracking accuracy
- [ ] Reduces motivation to continue learning

## 🔧 Troubleshooting Attempted
**What have you tried to fix this issue?**

**Basic Troubleshooting:**
- [ ] Refreshed the page/restarted app
- [ ] Cleared browser cache/app cache
- [ ] Tried different browser/device
- [ ] Checked internet connection
- [ ] Restarted device
- [ ] Updated app/browser
- [ ] Tried incognito/private mode
- [ ] Disabled browser extensions

**Advanced Troubleshooting:**
- [ ] Checked developer console for errors
- [ ] Monitored network requests
- [ ] Tested on different networks
- [ ] Tried different user account
- [ ] Tested at different times of day
- [ ] Compared with other devices

## 📊 Additional Data
**Any additional performance data:**

**Browser DevTools:**
- Console errors: [Paste any relevant errors]
- Network tab insights: [e.g. Large file downloads, failed requests]
- Performance tab results: [e.g. Main thread blocking, memory leaks]

**Mobile App Diagnostics:**
- Crash logs: [If available]
- Performance monitoring data: [If available]
- Battery usage statistics: [From device settings]

## 🎯 Business Impact
**How critical is this performance issue?**

**Severity:**
- [ ] 🔴 Critical - App unusable, blocking core functionality
- [ ] 🟠 High - Significantly impacts user experience
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Noticeable delay, but workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Minor optimization opportunity

**User Impact:**
- Estimated affected users: [e.g. All mobile users, Users with slow connections]
- Feature usage: [e.g. Core learning feature, Optional feature]
- Business impact: [e.g. May cause user churn, Affects premium conversions]

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have provided specific performance metrics
- [ ] I have included detailed environment information
- [ ] I have attempted basic troubleshooting
- [ ] I have described the expected performance
- [ ] I have quantified the impact on learning experience
- [ ] I have checked if this occurs on multiple devices/browsers
